reviews.review_description: I thought you would actually ride a bike don’t buy this

reviews.review_title: Most fun I've had in VR for a long time.
reviews.review_description:
Full disclosure, I actually found this game when searching to see if there was something similar to a game idea I had. These developers have made something very fun in mixed reality and it's sure to impress any fans of "Trials" style games or Pumped BMX. There is a nice relaxing flow to the gameplay and it makes you want to play "just one more try". The game still seems to be in a functional Beta release as I can press the left thumbstick and it reveals a debug window (note, this seems to slow the game down a bit and I often press it by accident). Some things I would like to see are:
1) Disable play area boundary so we can make the tracks life size. I would love to play this game outside or in a very large room and be standing on the edge of a life size bowl/track.
2) Auto snap top surface of track to ground level automatically via a button press, this way we can embed the track in the physical floor of mixed reality view without having to line it up manually which can be difficult to get just right.
3) Make the MR lighting during a timed event adjustable, I prefer to see my room well lit and the current method makes it too dark.
4) A track/bowl designer and shareable tracks would really make this app shine and increase player count.
5) Make the onscreen UI less invasive during gameplay as it can get in the way depending on track size (maybe toggle UI on/off). Also, there are some odd holes near the logos of Beachside Blaze and Sunset Jam on the upper track surface, suspect a previous logo may have been removed or something.

I'm amazed there is only one other review for this game at the time of writing, has there actually been an official launch? You guys may need to work on that as this game really needs to be seen.  Maybe create a discord channel, I'd love to chat more.

Edit: It's now a month later and sadly the developer doesn't seem to be active on their Steam page as no response. I also noticed today that the game requires internet access or it wont launch.
Insanely fun game!   Loving everything about it so far!!  Keep it coming!!      🫠🤙
